subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 28 Nov
deck_filename: SIP weekly update - week ending 28 Nov.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian and all,

Please find SIP weekly update attached for review.

Thank you.
Cuiwei

content.question:
- I need to understand when Local SIP/CN SIP/Direct will work for each
   market?
- And for direct will there be a difference for local vs CB direct?

Slide 19

   - For SG, I think it is Ok if Mall sellers want to sell
   - There is not much direct selling to TW?

Slide 25

   - Where did we land on the RTS topic in the end?

I remember we were
   supposed to get back quite a while back ago?

content.answer:
prepare and conduct seller communications
         -

         Additionally Local Direct requires ~4 weeks effort to configure
         seller center features for AME; this is not a launch blocker
and can run in
         parallel with other activities
         -

      Comparison summarized in the table below

Launch effort

CB Direct

Local Direct

Remarks

Seller origins

CN/KR/JP

ID/MY/VN/TH/PH

-

Seller communication

Y

Y

   -

   CB direct - CB RM/Sales resource to pitch UST sellers
   -

   Local direct - local RM pitching/Mass pitching

Logistics channel

Y (same as CNSIP)

Y

   -

   CB direct - same as CNSIP logs set up
   -

   Local Direct - ops/channel system set up is required for each new channel

Extra System effort

N

Y

   -

   CB direct - same as CNSIP logs / payment set up
   -

   Local Direct - system effort on global seller center/listing/logs
   channels/global wallet configuration




Slide 19

   -

   For SG, I think it is Ok if Mall sellers want to sell
   -

   There is not much direct selling to TW?
   -

      ID/VN>TW Direct selling potential is 200-500 ADO; we plan to launch
      because 1) ID/VN brand sellers expressed interest in TW market;

minimal
      incremental efforts on top of existing ID/VN direct lanes
      -

      Updates on upcoming lanes
      -

         PHMY/PHSG delayed to Jan-26, as PH compliance requires a tax
         collection system feature, dev on track
         -

         TWMY/TWSG delayed to Feb-26, as additional dev effort required for
         FM integration with TW SPX, dev on track



Slide 25

   -

   Where did we land on the RTS topic in the end? I remember we were
   supposed to get back quite a while back ago?


   -

   MYSG lane [RTS is in place]
   -

      RTS shipping cost has been optimized to be avg. US$4 per parcel, it
      is aligned with SGMY forward shipping rate card, and considering average
      MYSG parcel weight of 0.9kg.
      -

      Next step is to evaluate 3 options for RR threshold 1) status quo
      US$20; 2) $0 threshold to match SG local; 3) at RTS CPO, to include
      platform topline impact based on the markup, and additional PnL
impact from
      SGWH ops workload increase. ETA 12 Dec
      -

   Other lanes [RTS not available]
   -

      We first need to decide if it makes sense to set up the RTS flow for
      other lanes now; reg Direct team is assessing 2 options, proposal ETA 12
      Dec
      -

         Option 1: No RTS (no reverse logistics flow); mandatory RR
         insurance scheme hidden in commission fee [KR/JPCB model]
         -

         Option 2: Set up RTS (build reverse logistics flow) [CNCB/MYSG
         model]
         -

      The assessment will be on below dimensions for each lane
      -

         Buyer experience: Listing price impact from seller RR cost markup
         -

         Seller experience: RTS cost, lead time, parcel safety
         -

         Platform impact: RTS UE, system requirement, WH/SLS/CS/RM ops
         process and capacity requirement for RTS flow


Others

   -

   Any updates on Swarm?

[image: image.png]

Slide 16

   What is KH? What is LA?
   -

      KH = Cambodia
      -

      LA = Laos
      -

   I need to understand when Local SIP/CN SIP/Direct will work for each

   -

      -

         -

         [P1] Local SIP / Local Direct: Feb-26
         -

         [P1] KRJP Direct: Feb-26 tentative; MY PMO + MYCB + KRJP team to
         finalize plan
